title: Better Creepers
description: This resource pack changes Creeper textures based on the biome they spawn in.
body:
## [![Bisect Hosting](https://i.imgur.com/jZbdTSL.png)](https://bisecthosting.com) ***

       

*** ## Biome Creepers 🌿🔥❄️ *** Biome Creepers brings new life—and danger—to your Minecraft world with biome-specific Creeper textures! Each Creeper now takes on a unique look depending on the biome it spawns in, adding visual variety and making exploration more immersive. From frosty Creepers in snowy lands to mossy ones in lush jungles, you'll never look at these explosive mobs the same way again. Perfect for players who want to spice up survival without changing core gameplay! *** ## Requires OptiFine or EMF + ETF ⚙️ *** To display biome-based Creeper variants correctly, you’ll need one of the following: 🔹 [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) — make sure these settings are enabled: **Video Settings > Quality > Random Entities: ON** **Video Settings > Quality > Custom Entity Models (CEM): ON** 🔹 **[EMF](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-model-features) + [E](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric)**[T**F**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entity-texture-features-fabric) — an alternative to OptiFine for Sodium users. Install **Entity Model Features (EMF)** and **Entity Texture Features (ETF)** for full support. ⚠️ Without these, Creeper variants will not display correctly. 📌 **Important:** This resource pack must be placed _above_ Fresh Animations in the resource packs list to function correctly. *** ## Requests & Suggestions 💬 *** If you have ideas for new biome variants or feedback on existing ones, feel free to reach out! You can contact me on Discord: **marceus\_**. ***
